statements.status_notes: See CVE-2026-33870 entry on netty-codec-http. Mirrored here so scanners that flag netty-transport receive the same not_affected statement.
statements.impact_statement: Scanner over-match: the vulnerable code lives in netty-codec-http (see the sibling assessment above). OWASP Dependency-Check and similar CPE-based scanners propagate the CVE onto netty-transport via the broad cpe:2.3:a:netty:netty:* match. netty-transport ships no HTTP/1.1 chunked decoder, so even if it were exposed as a server (which Liquibase is not), the affected code path would not run from this artifact.

statements.status_notes: See CVE-2026-33871 entry on netty-codec-http2. Mirrored here so scanners that flag netty-transport receive the same not_affected statement.
statements.impact_statement: Scanner over-match: the vulnerable code lives in netty-codec-http2 (see the sibling assessment above). OWASP Dependency-Check and similar CPE-based scanners propagate the CVE onto netty-transport via the broad cpe:2.3:a:netty:netty:* match. netty-transport ships no HTTP/2 frame decoder, so even if it were exposed as a server (which Liquibase is not), the affected code path would not run from this artifact.
